ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the scheme was launched */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the scheme (e.g., equity, debt, hybrid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scheme */,
  "fund_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager managing the scheme */,
  "investment_minimum" TEXT /* Minimum investment amount required for the scheme */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the scheme is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schemes_fund_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("fund_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheme the metric belongs to */,
  "aum" TEXT /* Asset under management (AUM) of the scheme */,
  "expense_ratio" TEXT /* Expense ratio of the scheme */,
  "one_year_return" TEXT /* One-year return of the scheme */,
  "three_year_return" TEXT /* Three-year return of the scheme */,
  "five_year_return" TEXT /* Five-year return of the scheme */,
  "ten_year_return" TEXT /* Ten-year return of the scheme */,
  "since_launch_return" TEXT /* Return since launch of the scheme */,
  "alpha" TEXT /* Alpha value of the scheme */,
  "beta" TEXT /* Beta value of the scheme */,
  "sharpe_ratio" TEXT /* Sharpe ratio of the scheme */,
  "standard_deviation" TEXT /* Standard deviation of the scheme's returns */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheme being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the scheme */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the scheme was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., equity, debt, hybrid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_categories" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheme */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the scheme belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "fund_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fund manager */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the fund manager */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the fund manager is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fund manager was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_manager_id")
)
